service.name: Stripe
service.description_for_ai: World's leading payment processing API. Accept credit cards, bank transfers, crypto. Used by millions of businesses. Use when user needs to charge a customer, create a payment link, check payment status, or manage subscriptions.

auth.how_to_get: Register at https://dashboard.stripe.com/register — test keys available immediately
auth.cost: 2.9% + $0.30 per successful card charge. No monthly fee.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Create a payment intent to charge a customer. Returns a client_secret used by the frontend to confirm payment. Core method for accepting one-time payments.

amount.description: Amount in smallest currency unit (cents for USD, kopeks for RUB). E.g. 2000 = $20.00

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code: usd, eur, rub, kzt etc.

metadata.description: Key-value pairs for your own tracking

capabilities.description_for_ai: Create a shareable payment link that customers can open in their browser. Easiest way to collect payment — no code needed on frontend.

line_items[0][price].description: Price ID from your Stripe dashboard

capabilities.description_for_ai: Retrieve payment status and details by payment intent ID. Use to check if a payment was successful.

agent_hints.amount_tip: Amount is always in smallest currency unit. For RUB: 10000 = 100 rubles. For USD: 1000 = $10.00.
agent_hints.test_mode: Use sk_test_ keys for development. Test card: 4242 4242 4242 4242, any future date, any CVV.
agent_hints.russia_note: Stripe is NOT available in Russia as payment processor since 2022. For Russian payments use YooKassa or Tinkoff.
agent_hints.status_values: Payment status: requires_payment_method → requires_confirmation → processing → succeeded / canceled
